flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Scranton rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.9k → $33.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Scranton rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.5k → $54.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Scranton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
